name: Tamara Saudi Arabia and UAE BNPL Checkout API
what_it_does: Tamara Saudi Arabia and UAE buy-now-pay-later REST API for GCC merchants and e-commerce platforms to offer Tamara installment payment options to consumers across Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Qatar — enabling interest-free 3-installment, 6-installment, and pay-later payment options for MENA e-commerce with Sharia-compliant payment products and deep integration with Saudi and Gulf retail ecosystems. Enables AI agents to manage BNPL checkout for Gulf installment payment automation, handle payment redirect for Tamara authentication automation, access order confirmation for fulfillment trigger automation, retrieve payment status for transaction verification automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle cancellation for order lifecycle automation, access webhook for payment event notification automation, retrieve settlement for merchant disbursement automation, manage promotional offer for interest-free campaign automation, and integrate Tamara with GCC e-commerce, marketplace, and retail platforms for BNPL payment automation.
use_cases: Offering Tamara BNPL installment options to Saudi and UAE consumers for e-commerce checkout automation agents
Processing Tamara BNPL payments and receiving merchant settlements for GCC retail automation agents
Integrating Tamara with Saudi e-commerce platforms for Gulf market BNPL payment option agents
Handling Tamara payment webhooks and order lifecycle events for fulfillment workflow automation agents
not_for: Non-GCC markets (Tamara focuses on Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Gulf markets)
B2B enterprise procurement (Tamara is consumer BNPL for individual Gulf consumers)
High-ticket luxury items above Tamara's credit limit (Tamara has maximum order value thresholds)
best_when: A Saudi Arabian, UAE, or Gulf merchant wanting AI agents to offer Tamara BNPL installment payment options to GCC consumers across interest-free pay-in-3, pay-in-6, and deferred payment plans.
avoid_when: SAMA AND CBUAE BNPL REGULATIONS: Tamara operates under SAMA (Saudi) and CBUAE (UAE) BNPL regulatory frameworks; automated non-regulated BNPL implementation creates regulatory violation; automated must implement SAMA/CBUAE-required BNPL consumer disclosures. CONSUMER CREDIT APPROVAL IS DYNAMIC: Tamara performs consumer credit assessment; automated guaranteed approval assumption creates declined_by_tamara response for high-risk consumers; automated must handle declined payment states. MERCHANT AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Tamara BNPL requires signed merchant agreement; automated open API assumption creates no production access; automated must complete Tamara merchant onboarding. SHARIA COMPLIANCE IS CORE: Tamara positions as Sharia-compliant BNPL; automated conventional interest assumption creates product misrepresentation; automated must present Tamara as fee-based (not interest) installment product.

auth.notes: Tamara uses API token authentication. REST API with JSON. Riyadh, Saudi Arabia HQ. Founded 2020 by Abdulmajeed Alsukhan, Turki Bin Zarah, and Fahad Nazer. Products: Pay-in-3, pay-in-6, pay-later, merchant payments. SDKs: JavaScript, PHP, Python. SAMA licensed, CBUAE compliant. $366M raised (2022 Series B). Fintech unicorn. Covers Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar. Competes with Tabby for Gulf BNPL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchants; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant discount rate (MDR) per transaction; volume-based pricing; separate merchant settlement
pricing.notes: Riyadh SA. SAMA, CBUAE. MDR per transaction. Fintech unicorn. Saudi + Gulf BNPL focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; checkout and status APIs throttled; webhooks for order events

known_agent_gotchas: CONSUMER REDIRECT MANDATORY: Tamara BNPL requires consumer to authenticate and select installment plan on Tamara platform; automated server-side BNPL approval without consumer interaction creates checkout failure; automated must redirect consumer to Tamara checkout widget

CREDIT DECLINE MUST BE HANDLED: Tamara assesses consumer creditworthiness dynamically; automated 100% approval assumption creates unhandled tamara_declined state; automated must implement graceful alternative payment method fallback when Tamara declines

SAMA BNPL CONSUMER DISCLOSURES: SAMA requires specific BNPL disclosure language to Saudi consumers; automated Tamara integration without proper disclosure creates SAMA regulatory violation; automated must display SAMA-required installment terms prominently

SHARIA COMPLIANCE PRESENTATION: Tamara is positioned as fee-based (not interest) for Sharia compliance; automated 'interest-bearing installment' labeling creates product misrepresentation for Gulf Muslim consumers; automated must present as fee-based installment consistent with Tamara's Sharia-compliant positioning

WEBHOOK ORDER LIFECYCLE: Tamara webhooks fire on order approval, capture, refund, and cancellation; automated status polling assumption creates delayed payment processing; automated should implement Tamara webhooks for real-time order lifecycle management
agent_readiness.security_notes: Saudi/UAE BNPL. SAMA, CBUAE, PDPL. API token. Saudi Arabia/UAE. Consumer credit and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Saudi/UAE BNPL. SAMA, CBUAE, PDPL. API token. Gulf. Consumer credit and payment data.
